message:
chore(beads): Add E2E harness dependencies for comprehensive test coverage

Added dependencies to ensure E2E tests properly depend on the E2E harness
infrastructure. Changes include:
- wa-upg.11.6 → wa-01x (storage schema dependency)
- wa-nu4.3.9.9 → wa-nu4.3.9.8 (CI artifacts → E2E harness)
- wa-upg.10.5 → wa-nu4.3.9.9 (schema tests → CI artifacts)
- wa-upg.10.4 → wa-nu4.3.9.8 (CI drift checks → E2E harness)
- wa-upg.6.5 → wa-nu4.3.9.7 (E2E approval → harness)
- wa-upg.5.6, wa-upg.1.6, wa-upg.5.5 → wa-nu4.3.9.8 (E2E scripts → harness)

Total issues: 569 (185 ready, 344 blocked)
